base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of guts_man — a character (boss) from 1987 mega man. Guts Man — burly strongman. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Guts Man — burly strongman; lifts blocks and throws them. Large 301×134 boss sheet
